testsuite.name: package1.AmazonApplication.TC10_UpdateAndDeleteItemsFromCart

testcase.name: updatingCart
testcase.system-out: Browser Launched Successfully Product search is successful Click on Add to cart is successful Click on Add to cart in popup is successful Click on cart icon is successfull Click on Increment item is successful Item update is successful Click on delete option is successful TestCase is Pass
